name: Lemon Thins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add the eggs and mix well.
4. Beat in the flour and lemon extract.
5. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto an oiled baking sheet, leaving about 2 inches between each cookie.
6. Bake for the cookies to be golden brown around the edges.
7. Allow them to cool slightly on the pan.
8. Remove the cookies to a wire rack to cool completely.
